source.name: ElaadNL Laadprofielengenerator
source.redistribution_boundary: EV-002: generated profiles may be used for internal computations but raw API responses and generated libraries must not be committed or redistributed.

recommendation.profile_unit: one public charge point profile; documentation states that public locations model two charge points sharing one pole connection, so pole-level aggregation must preserve the charge-point member unit and record the two-per-pole convention separately.
recommendation.vehicle_mix: native ElaadNL public car/van mixture; do not reweight outside the generator
recommendation.capacity_rationale: Proposed because public AC street charging in Dutch outlook/count data is normally expressed as public charge points and ElaadNL exposes cp_capacity_kw per charge point; 22 kW should be PI-confirmed against the local-count unit before generation.
recommendation.simulated_year_rationale: Match EV-004 behavior-year discipline so external 2035 adoption counts, not generator-year changes, carry growth.
recommendation.smart_charging_status: not authorized for public Set B; any public smart counterfactual needs a separate EV-006-style same-seed pairing decision and control parameters

open_pi_decisions_before_generation: Approve or amend EV-008, especially whether 22 kW is the correct public charge-point capacity for the local public count unit.
Confirm that the public adoption counts in D-010/EV-007 represent charge points rather than poles or connectors, or define the conversion if they do not.
Confirm that public profiles should use the fixed 2030 generator year rather than a public-specific sensitivity year.
Confirm candidate M=1000 and held-out H=200 as the initial public finite-library design.
Confirm that no public smart-charging batch is part of Set B.
future_long_run_notice_template:
LONG-RUN NOTICE
Task: E2.S2 public Set B generation under proposed EV-008
Process: run data/get_elaad_profiles.py for public uncontrolled batches B_public_vancar_cp_y2030 seeds 150001-150901 and 151201-151301, 100 profiles per batch
Estimated wall time: <pilot runtime per batch> x 12 batches plus conversion/checksum overhead; send this notice if the estimate exceeds about 15 minutes
Resource impact: network API calls, local gzip/NPZ writes under ignored data/raw and data/processed paths, CPU for validation and checksums
Checkpoint plan: one durable batch manifest per seed under data/metadata/elaad_profiles; raw gzip and processed NPZ checksums recorded after each successful batch; completed seeds are validated before the next request
Resume procedure: rerun the same command/config; the script must validate existing request/config/checksums for completed seeds, skip verified seeds, retry only the next incomplete seed with the identical JSON body, and never register a retry as a duplicate batch
non_actions: No public API request was made in this packet.
No raw or processed public profile file was generated.
No held-out EV batch was opened.
No integrated net-load, congestion, event, P(E), adequacy, or manuscript result was produced.
